Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 15, 2026

Your Data Stays in Your Browser

All visa lookups happen entirely in your browser. Your passport nationalities, residence permits, and destination selections are never sent to any server. We do not collect, store, or transmit your travel document information.

Analytics

We use privacy-respecting analytics to understand which features are popular. This includes pages visited, country/region, device type, and referral source. We do not track individuals across sessions.

Contact

Privacy questions: contact@techtools365.com

Multi-passport visa intelligence. Free.

© 2026 VisaPathway by TechTools365. Visa requirements can change without notice — always verify with the relevant embassy or consulate before booking travel.
